mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM friend WHERE member_a_id = LEAST(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}) AND member_b_id = GREATEST(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend (member_a_id, member_b_id, created_at) VALUES (LEAST(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}), GREATEST(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}), NOW() )
